title: Car From Garn47
description:
Our Friend Car is now on minecraft... he will follow you.

he will help in your adventure using his stuning moral support...
body:
Car is a Mob that follow you when you call his name using an item, similar to his funcionality in the game garn47.    
When car is under a redstone block he can be clicked for making it his spawnpoint, can be used for minigames and puzzles by helping car go to a point in map.    
Also car have less hearts making him a easy target to dying in incredible fashion.

version 2: car drops a igniter for a pink concrete portal for "HOME"
